description: User is examining the 'Explore' page and reviewing available research tasks.
frame_description: The user is looking at a list of study cards including 'AI Interview' and 'Video Call'.

description: The 'Short tasks & surveys' section updates, replacing the streaming service survey with an AI Interview task.
The screen transitions from the Explore page to a task completion message instructing the user to close the website task.
The screen switches from the instruction message to a full-screen view of the user's webcam.
